message:
fix: KeepAlive followups — defer initial fetch flag, guard in-flight fetches (#5892)

- useCache: Don't set initialFetchDoneRef.current=true until route is
  active and fetch actually starts (#5891)
- useDataSource: Track keepAliveActive in a ref so in-flight fetches
  can skip setData/setError/setIsLoading after route becomes inactive (#5891)

Fixes #5891

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
